text.p: That is great. If you rest on the sorry state of things there you might lose time that you will never get back. God grant you all the grace!! My family is well and we are looking forward to the new year with new zeal.

The thing about the grapevine is that it is hardly lying or wrong, I should say. So that is true and settling he in fast. It has become an enormous responsibility but glad I am doing it at this time but not another time of my life.
How are you and the family? Are you still in ? How is the research going? Guess you should be making great progress. Greetings from all of us here. We hope we shall see someday soon.
Take care of you and keep in touch.
God bless richly and keep you firm.
Thanks very much for the message. It was a great blessing indeed. How are you and the family? And how is your research work going?
God bless you now and forever.

That is nice to hear that you have eventually moved over. I moved house here so was at a time not readily on internet. How are you coping? What about the family? Guess they are in Nigeria. Hope you took leave of absence in Nigeria.
Nice you were home. How is the family? And generally? Loads of plans for now, but will update you soon. God is just so faithful. Take care of you and God bless.
Just to let you know, You are never out of our mind!!
